articles.title: Turning URLs into RAG-ready chunks with get-md's chunkMarkdown
articles.focus: Explain the chunkMarkdown algorithm — how it splits on semantic boundaries (heading-aware greedy pack), why overlap carries chunk context forward across boundaries, and how estimateTokens budgets the chars/4 heuristic against a real context window.

articles.title: Bulk URL conversion — how to crawl an entire site with get-md
articles.focus: Show how convertBatch's bounded-concurrency async iterator and parseSitemap/convertSitemap work together for site-wide extraction, covering CLI usage (--sitemap, --batch, --concurrency), glob filtering, and the API equivalent for scripted pipelines.
